expectations.text: Abstract UserStatsRepository interface class is defined separately from the implementation
expectations.evidence: abstract class UserStats found in user_stats_repository.dart

expectations.text: Provider uses @riverpod annotation for code generation
All three AsyncValue states are handled: data, loading, and error (not just data)
Error state renders an error widget or message (not just returns nothing/empty)
expectations.evidence: 4 matches for error widget patterns including onRetry callback

expectations.text: No Color(0xFF...) literals in widget files
Screen displays all four stats: display name, total problems solved, streak, and accuracy
